_comment: Docker-compose overlay applied by docker/entrypoint.py. Flips cloud=true on the desktop_gpu_4090 device profile so the console runs through HedgeLLM (local gemma3:12b + the cloud chain). hedge_delay_ms=50 starts the cloud client almost immediately so the user sees cloud-sourced tokens win the race against the still-warming local model. No other change vs the committed config.json -- the overlay is per-top-level-section + per-device-profile deep merge (see _shallow_merge in entrypoint.py).
